hero.title: Unleash the Power Within
hero.subtitle: Where champions are forged through discipline, tradition, and modern excellence. Join the legacy of elite athletes.

programs.title: Yoga
programs.tagline: Build Balance. Improve Focus. Live Better.
programs.description: Yoga helps improve flexibility, reduce stress, and enhance mental clarity. Our sessions focus on breathing techniques, posture alignment, and relaxation methods.
programs.speciality: Personalized guidance for all age groups and fitness levels

programs.title: Silambam
programs.tagline: Master the Ancient Art of Strength & Discipline
programs.description: Silambam is a traditional martial art that builds agility, reflexes, and self-defense skills.
programs.speciality: Authentic training with focus on technique, speed, and discipline

programs.title: Physical Fitness
programs.description: Our fitness program focuses on overall body conditioning, strength, and endurance.
programs.speciality: Structured workouts tailored for beginners to advanced levels

programs.title: Aerobics
programs.tagline: Fun Workouts That Keep You Active
programs.description: Aerobics combines music and movement to make fitness enjoyable and energetic.

programs.title: Music
programs.description: We nurture musical talent by training students in rhythm, voice, and instruments.
programs.speciality: Step-by-step learning for beginners and advanced learners

programs.title: Badminton
programs.description: Badminton improves reflexes, coordination, and agility through structured practice.
programs.speciality: Professional coaching with match practice sessions

programs.title: Athletics
programs.tagline: Run Faster. Jump Higher. Achieve More.
programs.description: Athletics training develops speed, endurance, and competitive spirit.
programs.speciality: Focus on track & field techniques with performance tracking

programs.title: Roller Skating
programs.description: Roller skating enhances balance and coordination while being fun and exciting.
programs.speciality: Safe training environment with step-by-step skill development

programs.title: Martial Arts
programs.description: Martial arts training builds strength, confidence, and self-protection skills.
programs.speciality: Emphasis on discipline, respect, and real-world self-defense

programs.title: Football
programs.description: Football training develops teamwork, stamina, and strategic thinking.
programs.speciality: Match-based training with skill development drills
